overall.description: Cinematic game footage of the Gryffindor common room from a Harry Potter game, featuring a roaring fireplace, red medieval tapestries, and students in wizard robes walking through the cozy, wood-beamed hall while others relax on a red velvet sofa.

scene_state.functional_zone: wizard school common room with central fireplace and seating areas

agents.ego_description: standing still near the fireplace observing the common room activity and students passing through

notable_agents.action: two students in black wizard robes sitting on the red sofa conversing throughout the scene
student in dark robes periodically walking from the stone archway toward the right side of the room

entered.detail: large medieval stone fireplace with burning fire, dark mantelpiece, and decorative items on top
burgundy red wall coverings with gold heraldic patterns covering the right wall
thick dark wooden structural beams crossing the high vaulted ceiling
plush red velvet couch with students seated on it
tall brass floor lamp with glowing shade next to the sofa
gothic stone archway leading to other parts of the castle, visible in the background
gold-framed painting hanging on the tapestry wall above the side table
hanging iron chandelier with multiple candle lights suspended from the ceiling
small wooden table with a lamp and books next to the armchair
wooden balcony railing visible on the upper level to the left

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of the Gryffindor common room featuring a roaring central fireplace, red medieval tapestries, and dark wooden architecture. Two students sit conversing on a crimson sofa to the left while other students in wizard robes periodically walk through the stone archway in the background, crossing the room past the fireplace. The warm firelight and lamps create a cozy atmosphere throughout the continuous shot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic gaze across the Gryffindor common room, maintaining a cozy and timeless atmosphere of magical warmth. It begins with a focus on the roaring central fireplace, where flickering orange light illuminates the surrounding dark wooden architecture and rich red medieval tapestries. As the camera lingers, the scene captures the quiet activity of the room, with two students conversing on a crimson sofa to the left. The perspective then expands to include the background, where other students in wizard robes periodically emerge from a stone archway and cross the hall. The shot concludes by enveloping the entire space in the soft, golden glow of lamps and firelight, cementing the room's inviting ambiance.
